description: You are an Acoustic Consultant preparing the FZK-Haus residential model for a building regulations Part E compliance submission. The model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Read the acoustic specification from /home/ga/Desktop/acoustic_spec.txt and perform all required tasks: (1) Add the property 'AcousticRating' with value 'Rw 52 dB' to the Pset_WallCommon property set on ALL external walls (IfcWall with names starting EW), (2) Create a custom Pset_AcousticPerformance property set on ALL internal walls (IfcWall with names starting IW) with properties: SoundTransmissionClass (integer 45), ImpactInsulationClass (integer 50), FlankingTransmission (string 'Controlled'), (3) Create two IfcZone instances named 'Acoustic Zone A - Living' containing Living Room and Kitchen spaces, and 'Acoustic Zone B - Sleeping' containing Bedroom 1 and Bedroom 2 spaces. Save the enriched model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_acoustic.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65. ext_pset(25)+int_pset(30)+zones(20)=75 full. Max without zones: 55 insufficient. Must achieve 2 of 3 criteria to pass.
